MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Nancy Ivis, Plaintiff appeared in Propria Persona. No other appearance.

Ruling:
Hearing held. Defendant Peter Blume's Motion To Dismiss For Disobedience Of Court Orders is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff's complaint is ordered dismissed is continued to Nov-16-2007 at 9:00AM, Dept. #612. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Off Calendar Aug-14-2007 Set For Trial On Feb-19-08 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Jan-31-08 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 220

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Pl'S Responses To Written Discovery Requests And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions Against Pl
Off Calendar Jun-07-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Peter Blume's Motion To Compel Plaintiff's Responses To Written Discovery Requests is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Plaintiff is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Plaintiff in the amount of $402.50, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Pl'S Deposition And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-07-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Peter Blume's Motion To Compel Plaintiff's Deposition is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff's failures to appear were a misuse of the discovery process. Plaintiff is ordered to appear for her deposition on a date to be noticed by Defendant and to be completed no later than June 29, 2007. Sanctions are awarded against Plaintiff in the amount of $402.50, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
